roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Memorandum to the Court: Court Probation Restitution
Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)

/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL AND COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLEHAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM IN THIS CASE, PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $500,00 PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM ELLEN GEE   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVEFEE OF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)), /X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE STIPULATED AMOUNT,/X: CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED/X: DEFENDANT REFERRED TO ROOM 101 TO PAY RESTITUTION THROUGH THE COURT'S COLLECTION UNIT/CCU/CTORD:A GENERAL ORDERFOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AS TO VICTIM PATRICK DIPPERY/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 25D/CTS:25/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/DTC/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/RESTR/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION  UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:04-12-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:APD/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:GRIFFIN MCEVOY, LAW STUDENT, REPRESENTING THEDEFENDANT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF THE P,D,/MISDRED1:#1/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:#1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/

/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 02-11-21/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:03-05-21(30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 03-22-21/987,2/BAIL:7500/CONTD: PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/X:EST 1 HOUR/
